summary: Iteration 22: Fleet Simulation complete backend testing. All 24 tests passed for POST /api/operator/simulate/fleet endpoint and simulation isolation features. Verified: (1) Fleet simulation creates telemetry for multiple devices with unique simulation_run_id, (2) Per-device metric_patterns and gap_patterns work correctly, (3) Response includes all required fields: total_devices_affected, total_records_created, total_records_skipped, db_write_volume, scheduler_execution_ms, anomaly_distribution histogram (4 buckets), per_device_results array, anomaly_details, (4) RBAC enforcement (guardian=403, unauthenticated=401), (5) Error handling (404 for nonexistent device, 422 for empty device_patterns, 422 for invalid anomaly start times), (6) Deterministic mode via random_seed, (7) Heartbeat-seed returns simulation_run_id, (8) GET /api/operator/device-anomalies excludes simulated anomalies by default, (9) include_simulated=true includes simulated anomalies, (10) Fleet simulation anomalies marked with is_simulated=true and simulation_run_id.

test_results.test_fleet_simulation_creates_telemetry_: PASS - Creates telemetry for multiple devices with unique fleet-* simulation_run_id
test_results.test_fleet_simulation_with_per_device_me: PASS - Per-device metric patterns correctly applied
test_results.test_response_includes_db_write_volume: PASS - db_write_volume equals total_records_created without evaluation
test_results.test_deterministic_mode_via_random_seed: PASS - Same seed produces same record counts
test_results.test_device_anomalies_excludes_simulated: PASS - Simulated anomalies excluded by default
test_results.test_fleet_simulation_anomalies_marked_w: PASS - Anomalies have is_simulated=true and simulation_run_id
test_results.test_anomaly_details_returned_in_respons: PASS - anomaly_details list present with device_id and score
test_results.test_single_device_fleet_simulation: PASS - Single device fleet sim works

critical_code_review_comments: Fleet simulation correctly implements shared simulation_run_id across all devices in a single run
is_simulated flag properly isolates synthetic data from production baseline calculations
Anomaly detection scoping to simulation_run_id correctly avoids production cooldown conflicts
4-bucket anomaly score histogram provides useful distribution insight
db_write_volume correctly sums telemetry + anomaly rows for write volume tracking
scheduler_execution_ms provides accurate timing for evaluation performance monitoring
seed_data_creation: Multiple telemetry records and anomalies created via fleet simulation during tests. Devices used: DEV-001, DEV-002, WATCH-001, WBAND-LC-001, Mob-01. All seeded data marked with is_simulated=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet Simulation endpoint (POST /api/operator/simulate/fleet) fully tested. All 17 required test cases covered. Simulation isolation (is_simulated, simulation_run_id columns) verified working. Production baseline scheduler correctly excludes simulated telemetry. Device anomalies endpoint correctly filters simulated anomalies by default. Previous iteration 21 covered single-device heartbeat-seed, this iteration covered fleet-wide multi-device simulation.
